title: Space Complexity
story_hook: Sometimes extra memory saves huge time. Today you learn the trade-offs engineers make every day.

content.story: Sometimes extra memory saves huge time. Today you learn the trade-offs engineers make every day.

content.title: Space Complexity Basics
content.focus_note: Focus on memory vs time trade-offs.

content.doc_md:
Space complexity measures extra memory used.

Using extra arrays can reduce runtime - this is a valid engineering decision.

practice_problems.prompt: Identify extra space used in a solution with an extra array.
Convert an algorithm to in-place to save space.

quiz_questions.question: Space complexity measures
quiz_questions.explanation: Space complexity focuses on additional memory beyond input.

quiz_questions.question: Using a hash map often
quiz_questions.explanation: Hash maps trade space for speed.

content.task_prompt: Rewrite a solution to use less memory while keeping it correct.

recall_questions: What does O(1) extra space mean?
When is extra memory worth it?
How do space and time trade-off?
content.identity_affirmation: You now think like an engineer about trade-offs.
content.streak_reminder: Phase 1 consolidation is ready - finish strong.
